reviews.comment:
Quizá no sea de su incumbencia oero los caminos de ingreso y egreso estan mun deteriorados, su estado opaca la muy buena atención de los playeros y el personal del bar

(Translated by Google)
Maybe it's none of your business, but the entrance and exit paths are very deteriorated, their condition overshadows the very good service of the beach attendants and the bar staff.

reviews.comment:
Muy atentos y serviciales. El lugar tiene enchufes para cargar el celu. Importante para los GPS en rutas. Muy limpio todo, hasta los baños

(Translated by Google)
Very attentive and helpful. The place has outlets for charging cell phones. Important for GPS devices on routes. Everything was very clean, even the bathrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT20xUVVWWkhaM0poYlhCcVRpMDBVR1l6VldKWlRHYxAB

reviews.comment:
Como siempre la atención impecable. La limpieza de los baños también. La variedad de comida y kiosco también. Da gusto parar cuando uno está de pasada.

(Translated by Google)
As always, the service was impeccable. The restrooms were also spotless. The food selection and kiosk were great too. It's a pleasure to stop when you're passing through.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21Wa1JVeDJSbE5SUlRSblJsUnhUMVJLVERaSVVHYxAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
